news.title: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
news.description: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's

news.title: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap to lead ‘special projects’
news.description: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.

news.title: Anthropic buys biotech startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal: Reports
news.description: Anthropic has purchased the stealth biotech AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal, according to The Information and Eric Newcomer.

news.title: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
news.description: With the midterms right around the corner, the new group is positioned to back candidates who support the AI company's policy agenda.

news.title: AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers. What could go wrong?
news.description: Meta, Microsoft, and Google are all betting big on new natural gas power plants to run their AI data centers. They may regret it.

news.title: Meta Pauses Work With Mercor After Data Breach Puts AI Industry Secrets at Risk
news.description: Major AI labs are investigating a security incident that impacted Mercor, a leading data vendor. The incident could have exposed key data about how they train AI models.

news.title: OpenAI’s Fidji Simo Is Taking Medical Leave Amid an Executive Shake-Up
news.description: The company is undergoing major leadership restructuring as its CEO of AGI deployment goes on leave for “several weeks.”

news.title: OpenAI Acquires Tech Talk Show ‘TBPN’—and Buys Itself Some Positive News
news.description: OpenAI is acquiring TBPN, a business talk show that’s popular among Silicon Valley elites, as it continues to battle its negative public image.
